tcp   ESTAB  0      0      192.168.1.50:45231   192.168.1.100:80
	 cubic wscale:7,8 rto:204 rtt:1.234/0.617 ato:40 mss:1460 pmtu:1500 rcvmss:1460 advmss:1460 cwnd:10 ssthresh:2147483647 bytes_sent:12345 bytes_acked:12345 segs_out:100 segs_in:80 send 84.7Mbps lastsnd:4 lastrcv:8 lastack:4 pacing_rate 169Mbps delivery_rate 84.7Mbps delivered:100 app_limited busy:44ms rcv_rtt:1 rcv_space:29200 rcv_ssthresh:64076 minrtt:0.5 unacked:0 retrans:0/0
